description: DB-CPT-RHEL benchmark overview: side-by-side RHEL version comparison (Pipelines-style), latest-run bar charts by virtual users, PCP monitoring, and pass/fail from PostgreSQL.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  nopm AS value,
  'NOPM @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  nopm AS value,
  'NOPM @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  tpm AS value,
  'TPM @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  tpm AS value,
  'TPM @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  CASE WHEN pass_fail = 'PASS' THEN 1 WHEN pass_fail = 'FAIL' THEN 0 END AS value,
  'result @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
  AND pass_fail IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  run_started AS time,
  CASE WHEN pass_fail = 'PASS' THEN 1 WHEN pass_fail = 'FAIL' THEN 0 END AS value,
  'result @ ' || virtual_users AS metric
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
  AND pass_fail IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time

panels.title: RHEL comparison by virtual users (latest run per VU)

targets.rawSql:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    nopm
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN nopm END) AS "NOPM (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN nopm END) AS "NOPM (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
  virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    tpm
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN tpm END) AS "TPM (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN tpm END) AS "TPM (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    bench_cpu_max_pct
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN bench_cpu_max_pct END) AS "max CPU % (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN bench_cpu_max_pct END) AS "max CPU % (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    bench_read_iops_avg
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN bench_read_iops_avg END) AS "avg Read IOPS (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN bench_read_iops_avg END) AS "avg Read IOPS (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    bench_net_in_avg_kbps
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN bench_net_in_avg_kbps END) AS "Net In KB/s (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN bench_net_in_avg_kbps END) AS "Net In KB/s (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

panels.title: Bench Avg Net In vs VU

targets.rawSql:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    bench_net_out_avg_kbps
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN bench_net_out_avg_kbps END) AS "Net Out KB/s (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN bench_net_out_avg_kbps END) AS "Net Out KB/s (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

panels.title: Bench Avg Net Out vs VU

targets.rawSql:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    client_net_out_avg_kbps
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN client_net_out_avg_kbps END) AS "Client Net Out KB/s (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN client_net_out_avg_kbps END) AS "Client Net Out KB/s (compare ${compare_rhel})"

panels.title: Client Avg Net Out vs VU

targets.rawSql:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release)
    virtual_users::int AS vu,
    bench_rhel_release,
    bench_write_iops_avg
  FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
  WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
    AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
    AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
    AND bench_rhel_release IN ('${baseline_rhel}', '${compare_rhel}')
  ORDER BY virtual_users::int, bench_rhel_release, run_started DESC
)
SELECT
  vu::text AS "Virtual Users",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${baseline_rhel}' THEN bench_write_iops_avg END) AS "avg Write IOPS (baseline ${baseline_rhel})",
  max(CASE WHEN bench_rhel_release = '${compare_rhel}' THEN bench_write_iops_avg END) AS "avg Write IOPS (compare ${compare_rhel})"
FROM picked
GROUP BY vu
ORDER BY vu

SELECT run_started AS time, bench_cpu_avg_pct AS "CPU avg %", bench_cpu_p95_pct AS "CPU p95 %"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, bench_mem_avg_gib AS "Memory avg", bench_mem_p95_gib AS "Memory p95"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, bench_disk_read_avg_kbps AS "Read KB/s", bench_disk_write_avg_kbps AS "Write KB/s", bench_disk_total_avg_kbps AS "Total KB/s"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, bench_net_in_avg_kbps AS "In KB/s", bench_net_out_avg_kbps AS "Out KB/s"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, client_cpu_avg_pct AS "CPU avg %", client_cpu_p95_pct AS "CPU p95 %"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, client_mem_avg_gib AS "Memory avg", client_mem_p95_gib AS "Memory p95"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, client_disk_read_avg_kbps AS "Read KB/s", client_disk_write_avg_kbps AS "Write KB/s", client_disk_total_avg_kbps AS "Total KB/s"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT run_started AS time, client_net_in_avg_kbps AS "In KB/s", client_net_out_avg_kbps AS "Out KB/s"
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started

SELECT coalesce(pass_fail, 'N/A') AS result, count(*) AS runs
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
GROUP BY coalesce(pass_fail, 'N/A')
ORDER BY result

SELECT
  run_started,
  hardware,
  bench_rhel_family,
  bench_rhel_release,
  client_rhel_release,
  virtual_users,
  warehouses,
  nopm,
  tpm,
  pass_fail,
  profile_label,
  is_baseline,
  tuning_profile,
  bench_kernel,
  run_id
FROM db_cpt_rhel_runs_v
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_started)
  AND hardware ~* '${hardware:regex}'
  AND bench_rhel_family ~ '${rhel_family:regex}'
  AND virtual_users::text ~ '${virtual_users:regex}'
ORDER BY run_started DESC
